raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a causal or expressive link between mental states and physical condition",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Thoughts can possess qualities such as 'sickly'",
    "Mental states directly determine or manifest in bodily health",
    "Physical symptoms are (at least partly) expressions of thought quality"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent within a mind-body causation framework; relies on an unelaborated mechanism of 'expression'",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Psychosomatic effects are real and modifiable by thought patterns; the claim encourages beneficial mental habits without discouraging medical care",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Illness is attributed solely to 'sickly thoughts' while ignoring pathogens, genetics, injury or environment; leads to self-blame or refusal of treatment"
}
